faq_a1: Stickerts helps you complete your album by connecting you with other collectors to buy, sell, and trade stickers.
faq_q2: How do I contact a seller?
faq_a2: Click the button on the sticker you're interested in. We'll redirect you with a prewritten message to the seller's WhatsApp or email. From there, you coordinate price, payment method, and delivery directly.
faq_a3: It's a one-time $1.99 USD access pass that unlocks your seller profile for all of 2026. With it, you can publish your stickers, contact sellers, and receive direct messages from buyers.
faq_q4: Can I use Stickerts without the Pass?
faq_a4: Yes. All registered users get 1 free contact to try the platform. If you want to publish your own stickers or contact more sellers, you'll need the Collector Pass.
faq_q5: How do I publish my stickers?
faq_a5: You need the Collector Pass. Once it's active, tap the "+" button in the bottom-right corner. Upload a photo, describe the sticker, choose whether you're selling it, trading it, or both, and it will be visible to other collectors.
faq_a6: When publishing a sticker, you can mark it as "Trade". The buyer contacts you and you can offer your duplicates in exchange for the sticker they have. Everything is coordinated directly between you via WhatsApp, email, or any channel you agree on.
terms_intro: Read these terms carefully before using Stickerts. They govern your access to the platform and your use of its features and services.
terms_section_1_body: By accessing or using Stickerts, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any of them, you must stop using the platform immediately.
terms_section_2_body: Stickerts is a platform that connects collectors to publish, search for, buy, sell, or trade stickers. Stickerts does not act as a direct seller, is not a party to transactions between users, and does not guarantee that any transaction will be completed successfully.
terms_section_3_body: Use of Stickerts is only permitted for adults. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account, the information you provide when registering, and all activity carried out from your profile.
terms_section_4_body: Each user is solely responsible for the truthfulness, accuracy, and legality of the data, photos, descriptions, prices, and conditions of the stickers they publish or offer on Stickerts. Misleading, fraudulent, offensive content, or content that infringes third-party rights or applicable laws is not allowed.
terms_section_5_body: Stickerts only facilitates contact between users. The price, payment method, delivery, trade, sticker condition, and any other terms of the transaction are agreed directly between the parties outside the platform. We recommend that any meeting or exchange take place in public and safe places. Any transaction made between users is solely their own responsibility.
terms_section_6_body: Stickerts may offer products or digital access, including the Collector Pass. Unless expressly stated otherwise, the Collector Pass is a non-refundable digital access product. Purchasing the Pass enables features within the platform, but does not guarantee sales, trades, successful contacts, or business results for the user.
terms_section_7_body: Stickerts is not responsible for the truthfulness, authenticity, quality, condition, availability, or legality of the stickers offered on the platform, nor for users' behavior. We are also not liable for breaches, fraud, scams, listing errors, loss of money, loss of items, indirect damages, or any harm arising from contacts or transactions between users.
terms_section_8_body: Your use of Stickerts is also subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time by publishing the updated version on the platform. If you have questions about these terms, you can write to nicolas@smartpass.ec. These terms will be governed by the applicable laws of Ecuador.
privacy_intro: This policy explains how Stickerts collects, uses, and protects the information processed through the platform.
privacy_section_1_body: Stickerts is committed to protecting the personal data of its users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information processed through the platform, in compliance with Ecuador's Organic Law on Personal Data Protection.
privacy_section_2_body: Stickerts is responsible for processing the personal data used on the platform. We adopt reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and security of the information handled in the service.
privacy_section_3_body: The main personal data we collect is the user's email address. We may also process minimal operational information necessary for the platform to function, such as session data, listings, sticker images, messages sent within the service, and technical data associated with purchasing the Collector Pass when applicable. We do not collect personal data for purposes unrelated to Stickerts' operation.
privacy_section_4_body: We use the information processed on Stickerts solely to enable sign-in, keep the session active, send access links, facilitate contact between buyers and sellers, operate sticker listings, process features related to the Collector Pass, and protect the security of the service. Stickerts does not sell personal data or use it for commercial, advertising, or marketing purposes.
privacy_section_5_body: Stickerts only shares information when necessary to operate the platform or provide a feature requested by the user. This may include technology and payment providers involved in authentication, email delivery, image storage, technical analytics, and processing of the Collector Pass. The information needed may also be shared between users when the platform feature requires facilitating contact between buyers and sellers.
privacy_section_6_body: In accordance with Ecuador's Organic Law on Personal Data Protection, users may request access, rectification, updating, or deletion of their personal data when legally and technically appropriate. To exercise these rights or ask questions about data processing, you can write to nicolas@smartpass.ec.
privacy_section_7_body: Personal data will be retained for as long as necessary to provide the service, keep the account active, respond to user requests, resolve incidents, and comply with applicable legal or technical obligations. When the data is no longer necessary for these purposes, it may be deleted or anonymized as appropriate.
privacy_section_8_title: Use of cookies and session technologies
privacy_section_8_body: Stickerts uses cookies, session tokens, and equivalent technologies to enable authentication, keep users signed in, protect account access, and ensure the platform's basic operation. These technologies are not used for advertising purposes or for selling personal data.
privacy_section_9_body: Stickerts adopts reasonable measures to protect information from unauthorized access, alteration, loss, or misuse.
privacy_section_10_body: Stickerts may update this Privacy Policy at any time to reflect legal, operational, or functional changes to the platform. The current version will be available on this site. For any questions about this policy or the processing of personal data, you can contact us at nicolas@smartpass.ec.
